寒夜翩跹 安息在森林的生灵化作灵蝶，以思念为指引，与迷途的旅人短暂相会。\n1月18日更新后，主题活动【暮冬的溯影】限时开启！感应非凡性感套装【诺特·暮冬烁灵】！\n*套装动作【神蝶召来】可在完成【暮冬烁灵】套装及设计师之影收集后通过【成就】获取。 \n⭐暮冬烁灵⭐设计灵感揭秘：\n传闻在北地，有片只在闪电夜出现的奇幻森林。\n自由的生灵离去后，会化为蝴蝶在此处安息。\n今夜，是否有人会如传说般，去到那片森林之中？\n从枯木涌起的白雾，迷路的孩子，深藏于心底的回忆……\n记忆重逢，诺特忽然想起，那个从未忘记过的名字。\n灵蝶翩跹而来，轻轻点在他的嘴唇，仿佛诉说着无尽的思念。\n今夜过后，风停雪止，窗外朝阳初升，北地迎来了久违的晴天。\n尘封的大门缓缓开启，不起眼的枯木法杖上再度浮现古老预言，\n“摆脱命运之子，终结宿命之争”。 \n⭐暮冬烁灵⭐设计亮点：\n忽闪的灵蝶穿越白雾，起舞于梦境与回忆之间。\n黑色的枯木矗立在夜色之中，高悬的提灯散发出静谧的冷光。\n入夜后的迷雾是森林的意志，引导生灵走向平静与安息。\n这是一支由叹息组成的安魂曲。#闪耀暖暖\",\"itemId\":\"7324170854047304960\",\"statisticsInfo\":{\"collectCount\":121,\"diggCount\":3757,\"commentCount\":898},\"appId\":1128,\"secId\":\"Dw+KtzxdxKL616T5MQ14rZZ5xwiEuBf4kH7JgBJbEf0VuS9QAa2BMrYOqcx33KP0ijrzyiEscwTNY+mK\",\"isUserDigged\":false,\"longSecId\":\"Ci/KWnAeHBqexlfOnaNlJWGSFpPIKbK3UBHZC2mIMdL+sUnL+PniHOmbqUbV5/sPxxpLCjwGi65Vz1YTC6zntZE/oGo8mHbNFCYdC9xyKR8aH79oRajqVAcVFFFyuLabIxTPOPrQsly1ouUsEkjtUhEQrvzGDRj1vIa1CSABIgEDcw5L9w==\"},\"hideTxt\":\"未上架\",\"subTitle\":\"新年新气象，龙年行大运\",\"title\":\"暖暖祝你新春喜气洋洋\",\"cardType\":\"video\",\"showTitle\":true,\"moduleType\":2,\"uniqueId\":\"7324956075113840678\",\"bgImg\":[{\"showRetry\":true,\"showReplace\":true,\"name\":\"imageUpload.jpeg\",\"size\":\"6.6kb\",\"imageQuality\":\"\",\"status\":\"success\",\"showPicInfo\":true,\"url\":\"https://p9-magic.byteimg.com/tos-cn-i-tokbwntzau/magic_eco/cd309b15c7fe4d76a93106ef4fee4584~tplv-tokbwntzau-perf:0:0:q75.image?size=140x180\u0026magic_type=image_jpeg\",\"uid\":\"0.5478883104461616\"}],\"tabKey\":\"tab208\",\"cardTag\":\"精彩内容\",\"id\":\"c9d8a79bfa6aa7b1851ee571551e6c68\"},{\"bgImg\":[{\"imageQuality\":\"\",\"showReplace\":true,\"showPicInfo\":true,\"status\":\"success\",\"size\":\"9.5kb\",\"url\":\"https://p3-magic.byteimg.com/tos-cn-i-tokbwntzau/magic_eco/f022f5353e127be84aabb98ef2789f8b~tplv-tokbwntzau-perf:0:0:q75.image?size=140x180\u0026magic_type=image_jpeg\",\"uid\":\"0.4879801844089753\",\"showRetry\":true,\"name\":\"imageUpload.jpeg\"}],\"title\":\"崩坏3神秘嘉宾惊喜拜年\",\"moduleType\":2,\"prefectureName\":\"崩坏3\",\"videoIdObj\":{\"longSecId\":\"Ci970c1GJI/XZlRPLee8hHqoHpRAxJCsq+ut2EPS3QVqBvNrkUeeprqrZxwgM1D6eRpLCjz7PW4I5sHODtjOBed0+akprUgQCZshSPkom6m2cLv+D8/Z81wfL+UMe3nwpjLwiaLFyLKQyM2Kz6dV/wcQwojHDRj1vIa1CSABIgED8czK7g==\",\"isUserDigged\":false,\"appId\":1128,\"videoInfo\":{\"bigCoverUrl\":\"https://p26-sign.douyinpic.com/tos-cn-p-0015/oo3TdyCDjR7wBQkQ "cubic_fc3ba_config_resource_9":"{\"titleLogo\":\"https://sf1-cdn-tos.douyinstatic.com/obj/magic-cn/cubic/pure_png/title_new.png\",\"__version\":1}","cubic_olympic_ab":0,"cyber_0f91a_0802_setting":"{\"guideSchema\":\"https://www.bytedance.net/\",\"waitSec\":23,\"__version\":3}","cyber_act_yyh_ab":3,"cyber_act_yyh_effect_ab":0,"cyber_act_yyh_enable_scroll_monitor":0,"cyber_banner_switch":"prod","daily_rank_perf_config":{"enableSkeleton":true,"enableStraigtOut":true},"deco_text_modify_frequency":5,"disable_feed_mix_live_router_check":1,"disable_game_lottery":0,"doodle_max_count":140,"doodle_min_count":10,"ec_channel_check_login":0,"ecom_aftersale_aftersale_auto_next":0,"ecom_aftersale_big_font":0,"ecom_aftersale_instant_retail":0,"ecom_aftersale_returnbook_split":0,"ecom_aftersale_review":"0","ecom_comment_rank_style":0,"ecom_comment_style_opt1":0,"ecom_comment_style_opt2":0,"ecom_comment_upload":0,"ecom_fast_refund_colorless":0,"ecom_live_product_rank_ruler":[{"content":"- 抖音电商直播间带货榜是根据真实数据进行排名的直播间排行榜，希望帮助消费者通过榜单找到正在直播的好商品，让选择更简单。直播间排名越靠前曝光机会越大。","title":"直播间带货榜"},{"content":"- 直播间带货榜当前分为总榜、抖音旗舰榜、特色主题榜、国家补贴榜、商品类目榜，榜单形态持续更新中：\n- 总榜：按照上榜规则对全部电商直播间进行排序展示\n- 抖音旗舰榜：聚合抖音旗舰店铺热销直播间进行排序展示\n- 特色主题榜：由抖音电商运营就特色主题或活动，按照特定规则对直播间进行圈选后排序展示\n- 国家补贴榜：聚合正在直播国家补贴商品的直播间进行排序展示\n- 商品类目榜：按照直播间在播商品所属类目对相关直播间进行排序后展示","title":"榜单介绍"},{"content":"- 上榜直播间均为正在直播的直播间\n- 上榜作者基础要求：近30天无虚假交易处罚记录，近14天退单率无异常、无严重违规记录\n- 排序规则：以该直播间所售卖商品的【带货力、互动力、吸引力】进行综合排名，每小时结算","title":"上榜规则"},{"content":"- 带货力：根据单位时间内的交易额、交易量等数据指标综合评估直播间主播的带货能力\n- 互动力：根据单位时间内的直播间观看时长、分享率、评论率等数据指标综合评估直播间的互动氛围\n- 吸引力：根据单位时间内购买商品的新用户数、新增粉丝数等数据指标综合评估直播间对平台用户的吸引力","title":"指标解读"},{"content":"- 为保证榜单时效性，榜单每小时进行动态更新。由于技术等原因，榜单更新时间偶有延迟，具体更新时间以实际情况为准。\n- 直播间榜单会露出商品名称和商品标签。所有的上榜直播间都会展示一款商品，并露出对应的商品名称。同时，结合商品名称的露出，会露出唯一的商品标签，该标签由算法选取商品详情页的商品已有标签作为候选，不同的用户看到的标签不尽相同。整体上，商品标签的露出是为了给用户提供更多的决策理由，帮助更快的找到合适的直播间/商品。\n- 榜单排名旁的说明属于热度值标签，用于鼓励榜单中前3名的直播间和整体数据表现较好的直播间。热度标签只有三种，分别为：蝉联榜首、持续霸榜、排名飙升。每个直播间最多展示一种标签，若同一直播间同时获得多种热度标签，则按算法筛选展示唯一标签。\n- 平台将实时监控上榜直播间的数据表现，若发现直播间有刷单、互动异常、售卖假冒盗版商品等违规作弊行为，将立即对违规直播间进行下榜。低质作者、近期有虚假交易判罚、假货山寨判罚、直播间有处罚消息的作者均会有一定的上榜限制，请务必诚信经营、用心直播。","title":"补充说明"}],"ecom_live_scene_id_allow_list":["1001","1003","1031","1098","1099","1046","1091","1092","1093","1095","1082","1086","1087"],"ecom_logistics_map_late":0,"ecom_share_desc_type":0,"ecom_toolbar_ab":1,"effect_download_opt":true,"enable_anchor_gift":1,"enable_annie_live_transition_from_vc_fix":1,"enable_audio_draw_opt":false,"enable_broadcast_high_profile":1,"enable_feed_mix_live_router_check_arr":["search_result","general_search"],"enable_gift_extra_flex_model":false,"enable_gift_mp4_after_change_room":1,"enable_giftvideoview_render_appstate":0,"enable_live_thirhas_prop_bundled_party":false,"enable_new_guest_list_rule":true,"enable_preview_room_in_mobile_network":1,"enable_public_screen_layout_service":false,"enable_space_opt":false,"enable_switch_landscape":1,"enable_upstream_log":1,"enable_vip_recommend":true,"ent_bill_retain_popup":0,"entry":{"wallet_home":"sslocal://webcast_wallet"},"faction_competition_cross_room_rules":[{"desc":"榜单按照加入粉丝团、新增粉丝、送礼等互动行为综合排序，榜单值越高排名越靠前。","title":"排名规则"},{"desc":"榜单开启期间，观众每送出10钻石礼物、5名观众首次加入粉丝团或新增5个粉丝，均有机会为本直播间正在表演成员贡献1点榜单值，每名成员最多通过新加粉丝团获得1000点榜单值，每名成员最多通过新增粉丝获得1000点榜单值。","title":"计值规则"},{"desc":"本次活动由机构自行举办，与抖音平台无关。直播过程中有可能出现网络波动等极端情况导致数值存在一定误差的情况。","title":"其他"}],"faction_competition_region_rank_rules":[{"desc":"1）团员排名：自然日内累计榜单值，按赛道分别进行榜单排名，榜单数值每日24点清零，次日重新开始累计，达到当日晋级名次的主播成功进入下一轮。\n2）计值规则：1榜单值=10音浪=5新加团=5新增关注人数，每天最多通过加团获得1000榜单值，每天最多通过新增关注获得1000榜单值","title":"团员排名规则"},{"desc":"团榜单值=该团常驻团员榜单值加和，常驻团员将按照近期团员上场次数、送礼等数据综合判定，无法自主修改。","title":"团排名规则"},{"desc":"厂牌榜单值由旗下团员当日榜单值与榜单排名结果综合计算得出。每日比赛结束后（24:00）更新当日积分及排名结果。\n1）团员当日榜单值：当日超过1000荣誉值（+2分）；当日超过5000荣誉值（+5分）。若当日荣誉值超过5000，仅按+5分计，不与1000档叠加计算。单人单日最高得分为5分。\n2）团员榜单排名：每日比赛结束后，按厂牌团员排名计算得分，厂牌将获得其所有入榜团员的排名分之和。 #南京美食","cf_assets_type":0,"cf_recheck_ts":0,"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"馋鬼金牛女挑战用36小时逛吃南京，品尝了18家美食，包括工馄饨、徐建萍汤包、人生牛肉拉面、刘长兴、李记清真馆、乌饭麻团、红山动物园、无名老卤面、西北桥头、小江面条店、桂花汤圆、梅花糕和皮肚面等。南京美食丰富多样，令人回味无穷。","chapter_data":{"recommend_type":"-2"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"","timestamp":0,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/05cb280ec6a74dccad1baa9e65142a62?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=F3rlVTmRtYK0WKpWymvQFRO6Oc8%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"汪家馄饨","detail":"7块5一碗，肉多汤鲜，榨菜、虾皮自助。","timestamp":11500,"url":"https://p9-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/dc596c253cfc438b83d0009e4deda66c?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=CBe0XC4xoPK0TdFZisvuSXXLqDQ%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"徐建萍汤包","detail":"包子皮薄馅多，汤汁鲜美，鸭血粉丝汤和赤豆元宵也好吃。","timestamp":24500,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/ccead95d896d4bc6b28b7de99f83b296?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=e7gIZvNUw4MoYlwcCQRLki5oDnk%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"人生牛肉拉面","detail":"牛肉拉面肉多味美，手抓牛肉给量足。","timestamp":40500,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/dfdafabbbc0b41b1a86d4ab79b1a24f7?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=56P5zs6Dr0%2FGSF9mZiq16g91YYc%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"刘长兴","detail":"鱼汤馄饨鲜美，赤豆元宵好喝，秧草蒸饺吃不惯，小笼包好吃。","timestamp":52000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/97159ff5f1544353978144a1b02b691b?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=qa8k8fQQiPTrR%2F5t7izcO6vNXZY%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"李记清真馆","detail":"锅贴肉汁鲜甜，馄饨里有大虾仁，卤菜好吃，红烧牛肉面太顶。","timestamp":69000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/452784a985d84a78abaa847248bdb6b5?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=HUW11lLjZVL3ZehRudowuKFRHKU%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"乌饭麻团","detail":"甜咸口味，食材丰富，12元一份。","timestamp":85000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/603a6fd3267f4bc58dced1332eef4950?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=W%2FwFe7YASSTiI%2BRajVM549vJxmg%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"红山动物园","detail":"动物可爱，推荐游玩。","timestamp":100000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/a5aa45acbcba4ed59c1d3708690cc207?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=rgMRMX6lQKTeg43ZS5t4k4Rs2JI%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"无名老卤面","detail":"大肉面和雪菜肉丝面好吃，手擀面劲道入味。","timestamp":130000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/10b4a7e17dfe4a809655eada283334f5?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=diYokVg9MznINR%2FJtDj0EnKipCA%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"太犇牛","detail":"雪山香草籽抹茶拿铁，冰淇淋球融化后口感绝了","timestamp":147211,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/ac4096e5dab54fbbbd284d8d036460fd?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=Ks4LVZFiSEbkP8W5B1hbEgL5kDI%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"西北桥头","detail":"锅贴爆汁，牛肉馄饨鲜美。","timestamp":160490,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/8f587eb40e7d49d397733b57597a5738?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=u0wlnVYahwEbHqEc6QB%2BBvM1vdI%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"南京外卖五件套","detail":"徐家鸭子、绿柳居青团、叶新鸭血粉丝汤、拾叁茶、南京大牌档","timestamp":168461,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/d7f04ee2124d417cbcf55e7c9337a547?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=anFrnjBVO0X57uvab6SWGj43PSc%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"小江面条店","detail":"江湖传说一盆肉包三代人的泡泡馄饨，皮薄如蝉翼，6r一碗","timestamp":180903,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/4658e21017764b3da7ee0d326bb310b7?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=FB2IqCmTY0NDbnQz2vu4XQSz%2FpI%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"安家桂花汤圆","detail":"胖乎乎的汤圆，红豆沙黑芝麻双拼～","timestamp":194243,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/f3a75f1ed1b342c5bb7da259c3cd3741?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=7UGJEtQKx6nhQlWLVlHVfqZRI%2FI%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{ #南京美食","cf_assets_type":0,"cf_recheck_ts":0,"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"馋鬼金牛女挑战用36小时逛吃南京，品尝了18家美食，包括工馄饨、徐建萍汤包、人生牛肉拉面、刘长兴、李记清真馆、乌饭麻团、红山动物园、无名老卤面、西北桥头、小江面条店、桂花汤圆、梅花糕和皮肚面等。南京美食丰富多样，令人回味无穷。","chapter_data":{"recommend_type":"-2"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"","timestamp":0,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/05cb280ec6a74dccad1baa9e65142a62?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=F3rlVTmRtYK0WKpWymvQFRO6Oc8%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"汪家馄饨","detail":"7块5一碗，肉多汤鲜，榨菜、虾皮自助。","timestamp":11500,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/dc596c253cfc438b83d0009e4deda66c?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=dBUE6AZId27YXemOqkhMqbu4u9E%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"徐建萍汤包","detail":"包子皮薄馅多，汤汁鲜美，鸭血粉丝汤和赤豆元宵也好吃。","timestamp":24500,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/ccead95d896d4bc6b28b7de99f83b296?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=e7gIZvNUw4MoYlwcCQRLki5oDnk%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"人生牛肉拉面","detail":"牛肉拉面肉多味美，手抓牛肉给量足。","timestamp":40500,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/dfdafabbbc0b41b1a86d4ab79b1a24f7?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=56P5zs6Dr0%2FGSF9mZiq16g91YYc%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"刘长兴","detail":"鱼汤馄饨鲜美，赤豆元宵好喝，秧草蒸饺吃不惯，小笼包好吃。","timestamp":52000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/97159ff5f1544353978144a1b02b691b?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=qa8k8fQQiPTrR%2F5t7izcO6vNXZY%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"李记清真馆","detail":"锅贴肉汁鲜甜，馄饨里有大虾仁，卤菜好吃，红烧牛肉面太顶。","timestamp":69000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/452784a985d84a78abaa847248bdb6b5?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=HUW11lLjZVL3ZehRudowuKFRHKU%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"乌饭麻团","detail":"甜咸口味，食材丰富，12元一份。","timestamp":85000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/603a6fd3267f4bc58dced1332eef4950?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=W%2FwFe7YASSTiI%2BRajVM549vJxmg%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"红山动物园","detail":"动物可爱，推荐游玩。","timestamp":100000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/a5aa45acbcba4ed59c1d3708690cc207?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=rgMRMX6lQKTeg43ZS5t4k4Rs2JI%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"无名老卤面","detail":"大肉面和雪菜肉丝面好吃，手擀面劲道入味。","timestamp":130000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/10b4a7e17dfe4a809655eada283334f5?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=diYokVg9MznINR%2FJtDj0EnKipCA%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"太犇牛","detail":"雪山香草籽抹茶拿铁，冰淇淋球融化后口感绝了","timestamp":147211,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/ac4096e5dab54fbbbd284d8d036460fd?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=Ks4LVZFiSEbkP8W5B1hbEgL5kDI%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"西北桥头","detail":"锅贴爆汁，牛肉馄饨鲜美。","timestamp":160490,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/8f587eb40e7d49d397733b57597a5738?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=u0wlnVYahwEbHqEc6QB%2BBvM1vdI%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"南京外卖五件套","detail":"徐家鸭子、绿柳居青团、叶新鸭血粉丝汤、拾叁茶、南京大牌档","timestamp":168461,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/d7f04ee2124d417cbcf55e7c9337a547?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=anFrnjBVO0X57uvab6SWGj43PSc%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"小江面条店","detail":"江湖传说一盆肉包三代人的泡泡馄饨，皮薄如蝉翼，6r一碗","timestamp":180903,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/4658e21017764b3da7ee0d326bb310b7?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=FB2IqCmTY0NDbnQz2vu4XQSz%2FpI%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"安家桂花汤圆","detail":"胖乎乎的汤圆，红豆沙黑芝麻双拼～","timestamp":194243,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/f3a75f1ed1b342c5bb7da259c3cd3741?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=7UGJEtQKx6nhQlWLVlHVfqZRI%2FI%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{ "},"sub_type":0,"type":1,"user_count":0,"view_count":0}],"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"在北京极限12小时的逛吃攻略中，博主品尝了爆汁大肉饼、奶油炸糕、老北京抻面、卤煮、炸灌肠、豆汁儿、包子、扒牛肉条、红烧牛尾、烤鸭、炸鸡脑花饼、肥肠饼和各种甜品。北京美食丰富多样，令人回味无穷。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"","points":null,"timestamp":0,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/f25c2eb8adc84ef39d8eaea16dca0b8d?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=hjRtgizc1rPcpUTajS2PoxIPHDI%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"爆汁大肉饼","detail":"品尝爆汁大肉饼，饼里有扎实的牛肉球，汤汁浓郁，奶油炸糕口感像布丁。","points":null,"timestamp":12000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/0a66f78eeb0441198fbe64ec8e1206be?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=qDCxGv3Wli7rpdZJbXAuCwrKddo%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"老北京抻面馆","detail":"老北京抻面馆的卤和面无限量供应，面很劲道，卤比面多，还有炸素丸子。","points":null,"timestamp":108000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/50e0aad9195641378fdedd35e4b7a2eb?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=ZxndnH%2Bbuzhj0AbyU5DKshnUW3I%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"百年卤煮","detail":"百年卤煮店的卤煮火烧味道浓郁，火烧口感像疙瘩汤里的疙瘩，吸满了肉香。","points":null,"timestamp":211000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/73bca797daca450293c6c64cdb87c981?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=JkxN4FQP0xZDAa0hKzImGf3Xaw0%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"老北京豆汁儿","detail":"品尝老北京豆汁儿，搭配焦圈和咸菜，味道地道。","points":null,"timestamp":327000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/bdf44cbf25f8437d995052b578bb4f46?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=0nPVNi1Z7RYimmY7EJ6TWPXribk%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"包子铺","detail":"包子铺的包子皮比馅还香，肉汁浸透了包子皮，还有炒肝。","points":null,"timestamp":492000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/24e7b05bb2534b20919f37be5577d386?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=pgZS64hgsX9gme5JHBaG%2BhpNQpY%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"北京菜馆","detail":"北京菜馆的扒牛肉条酱香味浓，回味带甜，红烧牛尾软烂，烤鸭皮酥脆。","points":null,"timestamp":540000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/c0ac16cbaf2a48d5ad215334ffed1ab1?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=fXbzs%2B5dgUSIG7XPqxWjPMK1KmQ%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"下午茶","detail":"下午茶品尝炸鸡脑花饼和肥肠饼，脑花饼入口即化，芝麻香，鸡腿饼巨酥巨脆，一口咬下去还爆汁。","points":null,"timestamp":644000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/478473a536e14f26bcac8860e0c46849?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=LQJen2OS%2BoM9E2r4RvIS2t8HuzE%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"甜品店","detail":"甜品店的甜品精致，口感丰富，水果夹心，上面还有山楂糕和开心果加草莓。","points":null,"timestamp":716500,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/406ddfb23e7a4b74928dc72066c492c5?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=d6Jr5pjsuVSEcwlIQbYKmR%2BQlr4%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"结语","detail":"","points":null,"timestamp":753500,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/7992edcbd8434f7b9ebda6bcf813017b?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=TtKyRpgFfxrCnNz3LZ2kbz0mdN4%3D\u0026from=327834062"}],"chapter_review_status":2,"collect_stat":0,"comment_list":null,"comment_permission_info":{"can_comment":true,"comment_permission_status":0,"item_detail_entry":false,"press_entry":false,"toast_guide":false},"commerce_config_data":null,"commerce_top_labels":null,"create_scale_type":null,"create_time":1775211981,"danmaku_control":{"activities":[{"id":1224,"type":1}],"danmaku_cnt":2691,"enable_danmaku":true,"is_post_denied":false,"pass_through_params":"{\"ecology\":{\"eco_danmaku_atmosphere_intensity\":4,\"eco_danmaku_atmosphere_type\":23,\"eco_danmaku_problems_times\":1},\"has_danmaku\":1}","post_denied_reason":"","post_privilege_level":0,"skip_danmaku":false,"smart_mode_decision":0},"desc":"高铁启动前极限12小时逛吃首都！一口气逛吃30多种特色美食 "},"sub_type":0,"type":1,"user_count":0,"view_count":0}],"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"在苏州极限10小时的逛吃之旅中，品尝了苏式面、生煎包、梅花糕、海棠糕、糕团、肉汤圆、菜肉馄饨、大肘子、松鼠鱼、苏式绿豆汤、桂花赤豆小圆子、蟹黄拌面和芋泥麻薯等美食，感受到了苏州美食的独特魅力。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"","points":null,"timestamp":0,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/671fea57df41434dbc3a140255591345?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=e7ssKSX4AHWrHTFRjwLwIVjMX3o%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"苏式面","detail":"品尝了汤面和拌面，汤面口感顺滑，拌面有浓郁的猪油香味，猪心、大排、虾仁等食材美味可口。","points":null,"timestamp":25000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/49264120558a43afbfbe33a6cd29cd36?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=IqWTN%2BmYTjtoht8aDSLHIJG1w5I%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"生煎包与泡泡小馄饨","detail":"生煎包底部焦脆，馅料是一整颗大肉丸，味道很甜；泡泡小馄饨皮多馅少，味道一般。","points":null,"timestamp":151000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/860d18bd6d2f46c7a4e049dcff8cebe9?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=tYmkGkOjxHLqvDbPh6h3IcrmnYU%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"梅花糕、海棠糕与糕团","detail":"梅花糕和海棠糕外壳酥脆，内馅软糯，豆沙馅和枣泥馅味道不错；糕团种类丰富，油焖团子味道香甜，皮糯脆油润。","points":null,"timestamp":207000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/1a28f4fdddd54738878835f03d09d3cc?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=l9yWI7KhqmtVUFfHyZNyioNshSc%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"肉汤圆与菜肉馄饨","detail":"肉汤圆馅料鲜美，皮软糯；菜肉馄饨个大，皮劲道。","points":null,"timestamp":345000,"url":"https://p9-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/15595bf6c82f4619af94120c88ad68fc?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=oR5xi9f%2BHd%2BngO6IMIjXwrZqxMw%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"大肘子与松鼠鱼","detail":"大肘子肉质软烂，入口即化；松鼠鱼外观漂亮，鱼皮焦糯，肉质脆嫩。","points":null,"timestamp":384500,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/f019f67ecd3c4c24ade91ab220a97725?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=Wk5W%2B%2F5XD3q4qyHa4iyxRp%2FeN%2Fw%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"苏式绿豆汤与桂花赤豆小圆...","detail":"苏式绿豆汤有薄荷味，水冰凉，豆子颗颗分明，还有青红丝蜜枣；桂花赤豆小圆子味道好喝，汤圆软糯，像八宝粥和藕粉的结合体。","points":null,"timestamp":472000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/100d8d605c41413ab9bb3c46f0160699?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=uZQBLD0jAP9zdjSpxnj%2FM6FqSdw%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"蟹黄拌面与芋泥麻薯","detail":"蟹黄拌面味道鲜美，面软乎黏糊，能吃到蟹黄沙沙的颗粒；芋泥麻薯奶香味浓，口感拉丝。","points":null,"timestamp":534000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/11608b66d5554e8b8a2c09b8f1288974?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776798000\u0026x-signature=pikVosEKYxiWpUk3dNyJ5bEeE%2B0%3D\u0026from=327834062"}],"chapter_review_status":2,"collect_stat":0,"comment_list":null,"comment_permission_info":{"can_comment":true,"comment_permission_status":0,"item_detail_entry":false,"press_entry":false,"toast_guide":false},"commerce_config_data":null,"commerce_top_labels":null,"create_scale_type":null,"create_time":1770280381,"danmaku_control":{"activities":[{"id":1224,"type":1}],"danmaku_cnt":3024,"enable_danmaku":true,"is_post_denied":false,"pass_through_params":"{\"has_danmaku\":1}","post_denied_reason":"","post_privilege_level":0,"skip_danmaku":false,"smart_mode_decision":0},"desc":"一个人极限10小时逛吃苏州攻略！@你的饭搭子新年炫江南年味
